title: Debugging Code Comments
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a list of code comments for a given programming language (e.g., Java, Python) and a specific task (e.g., 'sorting a list of numbers'). The comments should be concise and explain the purpose of each variable or function. Assume the input is a short description of the task.
constraints: Must use technical vocabulary relevant to the programming language

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated comments adhere to the word count and technical vocabulary constraints.
Evaluate if the generated comments are clear and easy to understand.
Verify if the generated comments follow proper syntax for markdown.
